message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "DefaultMQProducerImpl" as DefaultMQProducerImpl
participant "Validators" as Validators
participant "MQClientManager" as MQClientManager
participant "MQClientAPIImpl" as MQClientAPIImpl
participant "PullMessageService" as PullMessageService
participant "RebalanceService" as RebalanceService
participant "MQClientInstance" as MQClientInstance

note right of DefaultMQProducerImpl: start
DefaultMQProducerImpl -> Validators: checkConfig
Validators --> DefaultMQProducerImpl: result
DefaultMQProducerImpl -> MQClientManager: getInstance
activate MQClientManager
MQClientManager -> MQClientManager: getAndCreateMQClientInstance
MQClientManager -> MQClientInstance: new
MQClientInstance --> MQClientManager: mQClientFactory: MQClientInstance
MQClientManager --> DefaultMQProducerImpl: mQClientFactory: MQClientInstance
deactivate MQClientManager

DefaultMQProducerImpl -> MQClientInstance: registerProducer
DefaultMQProducerImpl -> MQClientInstance: start
activate MQClientInstance
MQClientInstance -> MQClientAPIImpl: start
MQClientInstance -> MQClientInstance: startScheduledTask
MQClientInstance -> PullMessageService: start
MQClientInstance -> RebalanceService: start
MQClientInstance --> DefaultMQProducerImpl: start
DefaultMQProducerImpl -> MQClientInstance: sendHeartbeatToAllBrokerWithLock
deactivate MQClientInstance

note right of DefaultMQProducerImpl: start 结束
@enduml
